summary: FlixVault V2.0 final testing complete. Fixed critical bug in backend where feedback/content-request endpoints were using wrong key ('id' instead of 'user_id'). All features now working: Settings page saves profile correctly, Top 10 Movies/Series sections appear on homepage, Feedback system 100% functional, Request Content works.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: KeyError: 'id' - was using current_user['id'] instead of current_user['user_id']

issues: Missing DialogTitle for accessibility - console warnings present but not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: server.py has duplicate /api/user/profile endpoints (lines 152-164 and 1209-1226) - should consolidate
verify_token returns {'user_id': user_id} but some endpoints were incorrectly accessing current_user['id'] - all fixed now
seed_data_creation: Created test user settingstest@flixvault.com for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical features tested and working. Backend bug fixed where endpoints were using wrong key to access user_id from token. Settings page saves profile data correctly. Feedback system submits and retrieves feedback. Top 10 Movies and Top 10 Series sections appear on homepage. Free Movies section shows 17 movies with availability badges.

tests: UI shows all form fields (display_name, phone, address, profile_picture_url)

top_10_movies.notes: Section appears on homepage with 'Top 10 Movies' title

top_10_series.notes: Section appears on homepage with 'Top 10 Series' title

tests: UI shows Bug Report, Feature Request, Improvement options
UI shows Priority dropdown, Title input, Description textarea
My Feedback section shows submitted feedback

free_movies.notes: Shows availability badges (FREE, FREE ON PLEX)

back_navigation.notes: Back button present on Feedback page

onboarding_modal.notes: Appears on first visit, can be skipped

settings_page_auth_error.original_issue: User reported 'Invalid authentication credentials' error on Settings page
settings_page_auth_error.root_cause: Multiple endpoints in server.py were using current_user['id'] instead of current_user['user_id']. The verify_token function returns {'user_id': user_id} but endpoints were accessing the wrong key.
settings_page_auth_error.fix_applied: Changed all affected endpoints to use current_user['user_id']
